name: BP5758D LED driver
description: The BP5758D output component exposes a BP5758D channel of a global [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/bp5758d#bp5758d-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Bp5758D ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/bp5758d#bp5758d-component). Use this if you have multiple BP5758D chains you want to use at the same time.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the BP5758D chain of this output component. Valid values are 1-5.

config_entries.label: Current
config_entries.description: Current in mA, valid values are 0-90, default 10.
